column1: # grep-tells.tsv ‚Äî TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-state-restoration (sr-01 ‚Ä¶ sr-11).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard ‚Üí runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only ‚Äî the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. The wrapper-confusion
# defects (sr-02/03) are SEMANTIC: grep can only surface the wrapper; the value's app-wide-vs-per-window
# meaning is invisible to grep, so READ is mandatory. The one structural rule grep cannot express
# (restorationBehavior NOT inside a #available(macOS 15) gate) lives in ast-grep/*.yml (tier 2).

column4: UIKit/INVENTED restoration symbol on SwiftUI macOS (does not exist) ‚Üí @SceneStorage / @AppStorage / restorationBehavior
@SceneStorage = PER-WINDOW UI state. READ: if this value is an app-wide preference (one truth for all windows) it belongs in @AppStorage (sr-02). Apply the wrapper test.
@AppStorage = APP-WIDE preference. READ: if this holds per-window UI state (selected tab/sidebar/detail/scroll) it leaks across windows ‚Üí @SceneStorage (sr-03). Apply the wrapper test.
hand-rolled UserDefaults ‚Äî for a simple app-wide pref prefer @AppStorage; READ to confirm it is not deliberate (observers/suites) (sr-04)
selection/column-visibility ‚Äî if bound to plain @State (not @SceneStorage) the app forgets it on relaunch ‚Üí @SceneStorage (sr-05). READ the bound property's wrapper.
NavigationPath/path ‚Äî verify it is persisted via NavigationPath(codable:)/.codable into @SceneStorage, else deep navigation is lost on relaunch (sr-06)
custom type in @AppStorage/@SceneStorage ‚Äî verify it conforms to RawRepresentable (or Codable round-trip); a bare struct/enum/class will not persist/compile (sr-07)
oversized value in key-value storage ‚Äî Data/array/image is size-limited in scene/app storage ‚Üí move to SwiftData or a file (sr-08, cross_ref swiftdata)
custom URL scheme / activity / external-event matcher ‚Äî verify an onOpenURL(perform:) (or onContinueUserActivity) handler actually consumes it, else the deep link is dead (sr-09)
restorationBehavior is macOS 15.0+ ‚Äî REPORT only if deployment target < macOS 15 and it is not gated #available(macOS 15, *) (read in ORIENT) (sr-10)
focusedSceneValue has TWO floors ‚Äî key-path overload macOS 12, object overload macOS 14; VERIFY which overload + gate accordingly before quoting a floor (sr-11)
